reviews.review_description:
It's an interesting notion, but it has a lot of problems.

It can only be controlled with hand tracking. If your controllers are active, you can't do anything whatsoever. Nothing tells you this.

The hand control is clunky and unresponsive. I figured out how to move the panel, but couldn't figure out how to stop. 

It takes forever to type anything.

The backgrounds are cool, but that's all this has to offer. You'll get better results out of any other AI game.
I wanted to like it. But it simply does not work at all.  I would give it no stars but I’m forced to give one.
First time I've ever seen AI make 3D scenes like this, especially in mixed reality! So epic
Love the visuals that come out of the screen. Immersive!
